all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the Lord was with Joseph, and he was a prosperous man; and he was in the house of his master the Egyptian.
Genesis 39:2
Quote of the Day
"It can change the course of our lives to see our circumstances through the lens of God’s eternal plan."
Brother Chad H Webb | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
